MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OBRIEN, KATHERINE HEARING SET FOR AUG-28-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT KATHERINE OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PROCEDURALLY, THE APPLICATION WAS TIMELY FILED WITHIN 6 MONTHS OF THE DATE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED, AND DEFENDANT HAS ATTACHED A COPY OF THE PROPOSED ANSWER TO BE FILED. (CCP 473(B).) PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S DISCRETIONARY POWERS UNDER CCP 437(B), THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT RELIEF AS THE RECORD SHOWS THAT DEFAULT JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT AS A RESULT OF HER OWN MISTAKE AND INADVERTENCE. (ID.) PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR $1000 IN PENALTY FEES UNDER CCP 473(C) IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENT O. KIRMACI, TEL. NO. 956-0999 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KATHERINE OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. Procedurally, the application was timely filed within 6 months of the date default was entered, and Defendant has attached a copy of the proposed answer to be filed. (CCP 473(b).) Pursuant to the Court's discretionary powers under CCP 437(b), the Court grants Defendant relief as the record shows that default judgment was entered against defendant as a result of her own mistake and inadvertence. (Id.) Plaintiff's request for $1000 in penalty fees under CCP 473(c) is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To Sep-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kent Kirmaci, Esq. of the Law Offices of Kent O. Kirmaci, Tel. 415.956.0999, for defendant and moving party;
Jamie T. San Gabriel, Esq. of Zee law Group, Tel. 626.588.1600, for plaintiff and opposing party, via Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEFENDANT KATHERINE OBRIEN'S MOTION To SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to September 26, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
